division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
chapter_title: Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title
text: A low-speed vehicle operated pursuant to Section 21115 or 21115.1 is exempt from registration.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 1. Vehicles Subject to Registration [4000 - 4023]
##### § 4023

A low-speed vehicle operated pursuant to Section 21115 or 21115.1 is exempt from registration.

*(Added by Stats. 1999, Ch. 140, Sec. 2. Effective January 1, 2000.)*

subsections.text: A low-speed vehicle operated pursuant to Section 21115 or 21115.1 is exempt from registration.

history.raw: (Added by Stats. 1999, Ch. 140, Sec. 2. Effective January 1, 2000.)
